text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Starting today, my trainee and I will be taking on
the Twinkle Series. The Umamusume joining me
for this journey is none other than...

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: I am Air Groove. Allow me to remind you...

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
I seek to embody the ideals of all Umamusume
and become their guiding beacon. For, as the
Empress, these are the heights I must strive
towards.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
The path is precarious, and affords us no time to
waste standing still. Therefore, as my trainer, you
must follow me closely and without ever losing
focus.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, <chrname> and I take our
first steps towards competing in the Twinkle
Series!
